reasoning: As of late October 2025, 'A Minecraft Movie' holds the undisputed highest domestic 3-day opening weekend of the year at $162.8M. Throughout the summer, major blockbusters failed to surpass this figure, including 'Lilo & Stitch' ($146M), 'Superman' ($122M), 'The Fantastic Four: First Steps' ($118M), and 'Jurassic World Rebirth' ($91.5M 3-day). With the knowledge cutoff at October 26, 2025, the only significant unreleased contenders are 'Wicked For Good' / 'Wicked: Part Two' (Nov), 'Zootopia 2' (Nov), and 'Avatar: Fire and Ash' (Dec). 'Zootopia 2' opens on a pre-Thanksgiving Wednesday, which severely dilutes its 3-day strictly weekend total. Avatar titles are notoriously leggy rather than highly frontloaded ('Avatar: The Way of Water' opened to $134M), making a jump to $163M+ unlikely for 'Fire and Ash'. Thus, Minecraft is the heavy favorite to win the 2025 3-day opening box office crown.
